# Joseph Tas Digital

> Data engineer and analytics specialist. ETL pipelines, data factories, and
> analytics infrastructure that turn raw data into actionable intelligence.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Services, portfolio, blog, and contact.
- [Blog](/#blog): Articles on data, analytics, consent, and marketing.
- [Portfolio](/#work): Selected technical case studies and projects.
- [Services](/#services): Data engineering and analytics offerings.
- [Contact](/#contact): Get in touch for projects and audits.
